summary: Comprehensive MVP testing of VCSA (Vacation Club Sales Academy) platform completed. Backend APIs fully functional, frontend UI loading with premium design, authentication working, admin panel accessible.

ui_bugs.issue: Dashboard content showing loading spinner instead of actual data after successful login
ui_bugs.details: User can login successfully and gets redirected to dashboard, but dashboard shows loading state instead of user data and content

integration_issues.issue: Dashboard API calls may be timing out or not completing properly

passed_tests: Backend API root endpoint (200)
User registration API (200)
Demo user login API (200)
Admin user login API (200)
Protected endpoints properly return 401 for unauthenticated users
Admin endpoints properly protected (401 without auth)
Payment endpoints properly protected (401 without auth)
Error handling for invalid endpoints (404)
Method not allowed handling (405)
Landing page loads with hero section, navigation, stats
Landing page features section visible
Login form elements present and functional
Admin user login successful
Admin panel accessible with proper admin role
Admin panel tabs (Users, Content) working
Admin panel shows proper user statistics (3 users, 1 VIP)
Admin panel shows content statistics (4 courses, 2 events, 2 posts, 4 resources)
Registration page form elements present (name, email, password, submit)
Google OAuth button present on registration page
Membership page loads with pricing plans ($0 Free, $97 VIP Monthly, $970 VIP Annual)
Navigation between authenticated pages working
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix dashboard loading issue - the dashboard API calls are not completing properly, causing the page to show loading spinner instead of user dashboard content. All other functionality is working correctly.

success_percentage.frontend: 90% - Most UI working, dashboard loading issue identified
